title: convolvulus terminalis
intro: Convolvulus terminalis, also known as the Silver Moon or Small White Morning Glory, is a flowering plant species native to India and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Convolvulus terminalis is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and supporting cardiovascular health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
